For each tuple, the difference is (5-3)=2, (7-1)=6, (3-10)= -7, (2-1)=1. The maximum here is 6. But the assert says the result is 7. Wait, that's conflicting. def max_difference(tuples):
    first_elements = [t[0] for t in tuples]
    second_elements = [t[1] for t in tuples]

        for b in second_elements:
            diff = a - b
            if diff > max_diff:
                max_diff = diff
    return max_diff

def max_difference(tuples):
    max_diff = 0
    for i in range(len(tuples)):
        a = tuples[i][0]
        for j in range(len(tuples)):
            if i != j:
                b = tuples[j][1]
                diff = a - b
                if diff > max_diff:
                    max_diff = diff
    return max_diff
